description: The checked 112-one witness proves the lower bound. At 113 ones, arithmetic eliminates 12 of 25 feasible degree profiles. Ten remaining profiles have direct CaDiCaL DRAT/LRAT refutations, one has a complete row-stabilizer cube cover with a checked leaf proof for every cube, and two have complete exact SCIP/VIPR orbit covers. The master manifest binds every local descriptor, formula, catalog, checker identity, and release part by SHA-256.

historical_untraced_session.summary: The original sweep retained no proof traces and remains non-load-bearing. The theorem instead uses the later proof-producing runs recorded by the master manifest.

publication_consequence.vertex_deletion: If an 11x23 K_3,3-free matrix had 124 ones, deleting a row of degree at most floor(124/11)=11 would leave a forbidden 10x23 example with at least 113 ones.
